response: A blue sugar cube has been liquefied. Which hole should you place it in: the round one, the square one, or the star-shaped one?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a liquefied blue sugar cube. Put it into one of these holes: the star-shaped one, the square one, or the round one. Which one?
